entities.name: Donella Meadows

entities.context: Field/approach for understanding complex systems and interventions

entities.name: Leverage Points
entities.context: Meadows' framework identifying strategic intervention points in systems, from her 1997 essay

entities.context: Influential 1972 book on resource constraints, co-authored by Meadows

entities.name: MacArthur Foundation
